fields.name: Ambient Fog Parameters
fields.definition: All heights are absolute world space height

fields.name: distance bias:world units#negative means into the screen
Patchy Fog Per-Cluster Parameters
fields.definition:
Sheet density.............Intensity scaling factor applied to all sheets
Full intensity height.....Height above 0 below which fog should be at full intensity
Half intensity height.....Height at which fog should be attenuated to half intensity
Wind......................Direction and intensity of fog motion due to wind

fields.name: Weather effect
fields.definition:
Effect tag to create nearby raindrops, snowflakes, etc.
Particle systems from this effect will follow the camera and wrap seamlessly as you turn or move.

fields.name: fog color intensity#scales color up or down to allow for HDR values

options: Use Floating Shadow for Fog Light
Only use fog light for light shafts
